text.title: FinOps Framework — INFORM / OPTIMIZE / OPERATE Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on spend + sponsorship + sustainability requirements.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: assess-current-phase
step.action: Score current state against phase-specific KPI buckets; pick the lowest-met phase as 'current'.

step.name: name-lead-and-raci
step.action: Name a practitioner; document RACI per cost decision class.

step.name: set-cadence-and-kpis
step.action: Lock council cadence; define phase KPIs with baselines.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run validator; share charter with sponsors; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
